name: Bean Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup great northern beans (medium-size white beans)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the great northern beans until soft, then mash them to make about one cup of mashed beans.
2. Cream together the mashed beans, white sugar, brown sugar, vanilla, and salt (if using).
3. Process the rolled oats in a cuisinart until they become oat flour with a little grit.
4. Mix the oat flour, baking powder, and baking soda into the bean mixture.
5. Add the chopped dried apricots to the batter.
6. Form the batter into 12 huge cookies or 24 big balls.
7. Bake at 375°F for about 15 minutes (for 12 huge cookies) or 10 minutes (for 24 big cookies).
